headline: FedEx Freight initiated at ‘Buy’ by Bank of America on margin expansion potential
summary: FedEx Freight (NYSE:FDXF) shares traded around $152 on Tuesday afternoon after Bank of America initiated coverage of the newly independent less-than-truckload (LTL) carrier with a ‘Buy’ rating and a $185 price target. The initiation comes one day after FedEx Freight was spun off from FedEx...

headline: Truist starts FedEx Freight at Hold, Investor Day reinforces measured approach
summary: Investing.com -- Truist Securities initiated coverage of FedEx Freight Holding Company (FDXF) with a Hold rating and a $155 price target in a note on Tuesday following the company's completed spin-off from FedEx Corporation (FDX).

headline: Wall Street Weighs In on FedEx Freight Stock. It’s a Show-Me Story.
summary: FedEx Freight began trading as an independent company this week, but analysts say stronger margins and operating performance are needed before they become more bullish on the stock.

headline: SiftedAI turns parcel cost monitoring from reactive to automatic
summary: SiftedAI, the leading logistics intelligence platform trusted by thousands of businesses, today announced the availability of Actions & Alerts within SiftedAI Copilot, an agentic AI platform for parcel shipping management that runs analyses, pulls the data it needs, and surfaces what requires attention without waiting to be asked. The new capability automates recurring shipping analysis and sends proactive notifications when costs shift, giving logistics teams a clear view of what's changing bef

headline: BMO Capital Maintains Market Perform on FedEx, Lowers Price Target to $340
summary: BMO Capital  analyst Fadi Chamoun   maintains FedEx (NYSE:FDX) with a Market Perform and lowers the price target from $410 to $340.

headline: FedEx Freight: Spinoff Makes Sense, But I Need More Numbers
summary: FedEx Freight joins major indices post-spin, but LTL volumes and profits are down amid macro headwinds. Click for more on the new issue FDXF.

headline: US Stock Market Today: S&P 500 Futures Edge Higher On Strong Global Manufacturing Data
summary: The Morning Bull - US Market Morning Update Tuesday, Jun, 2 2026 US stock futures are pointing slightly higher this morning, with E-mini S&P 500 contracts up about 0.2% and Nasdaq-100 futures ahead roughly 0.3%, as investors weigh stronger global manufacturing data against higher borrowing costs. Several key factory scorecards, such as the China Manufacturing PMI at 51.8 and the UK gauge at 53.9, signal production is picking up, which suggests healthier demand for goods and raw materials. At...
